indication: Glivec is indicated for the treatment of adult and paediatric patients with newly diagnosed Philadelphia chromosome positive acute lymphoblastic leukaemia (Ph+ ALL) integrated with chemotherapy.
description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized imatinib for the treatment of adult and pediatric patients with newly diagnosed Philadelphia chromosome positive acute lymphoblastic leukemia (Ph+ ALL) integrated with chemotherapy.
raw_cancer_type: Philadelphia chromosome positive acute lymphoblastic leukaemia (Ph+ ALL)

document.name: Glivec (imatinib) [product information]. EMA.
